subject: chemistry
The fourth state of matter is called wha.question_text: The fourth state of matter is called what? What defines it?
The fourth state of matter is called wha.answer_text:
Plasma! Its the gaseous state of matter that contains appreciable numbers of electrically charged particles. 

The presence of these charged particles imparts unique properties to plasmas that justify their classification as a state of matter distinct from gases.
